"is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7584743172199173182","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+双男主+双洁+强强+1v1+救赎+群像+团宠+智斗+HE+少量雄竞修罗场】
冰冷神性高智美人受× 阴湿病态偏执忠犬攻
—————
江雪雩，一个精致如神祇、情感如冻土的青年，患有情感缺失症的他活在绝对的理性中，直至被抛入名为“虚妄回廊”的无限恐怖地狱。

在这里，血腥与诡谲是常态，死亡与疯狂是结局，江雪雩凭借冰冷的智慧一次次极限翻盘….而他不知道，自己始终被一束目光病态地锁定。

陆焚，“虚妄回廊”最神秘的存在。
在众人面前高冷如深渊，唯独在江雪雩身后，他的爱恋扭曲如阴湿的男鬼，炽热似焚身的野火。他渴望江雪雩永远保持神性的纯粹，又疯狂地期盼那双异色瞳能为自己泛起一丝波澜——这矛盾，几乎将他撕裂。

当最终的阴谋被层层剥开，当轮回的真相露出狰狞面目，两人站在系统核心的悬崖边。陆焚用尽所有权限与存在，为江雪雩铺平最后的路。抹杀前，他第一次，温柔又眷恋地轻触了那片从未有人抵达的唇。

那一触，如同星火坠入冰原。

神性之人的内心，那片万年冻雪、寸草不生的荒芜之地，裂开了一道缝隙….

【爱，是理性世界无法计算的变量，却是江雪雩漫长生命中，第一个，也是唯一一个奇迹。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b2bcb5ba84feea5b6c3a749bfed14118~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不喜橙子","author_id":"","book_id":"7584743172199173182","book_name":"冰山美人他在无限副本里封神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2392人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":865,"name":"忠犬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=865&name=忠犬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":468,"name":"冰山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=468&name=冰山&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7584850018008302142","read_count":"2392","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"381090"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","sc
